summary: Live-applied ADR 0261 on `codex/ws-0261-main-finish`, hardened the packaged API gateway runtime so governed browser-runner replay artifacts survive container rebuilds without macOS sidecars, and then re-verified the private runtime, authenticated gateway route, governed Dify tool path, platform service catalog, and promotion gate from the synchronized `origin/main` integration tree that carried repo version `0.177.95` and observed platform version `0.130.63`.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_browser_runner_client.py tests/test_packaged_repo_paths.py tests/test_agent_tool_registry.py -q` passed with `18 passed`; `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with fastapi --with httpx python -m pytest tests/test_browser_runner_service.py -q` passed with `3 passed`; and `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with httpx --with cryptography --with fastapi python -m pytest tests/test_api_gateway.py -k dify_tools_route -q` passed with `2 passed`.

verification.check: Governed tool registry and packaged repo-path validation
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/agent_tool_registry.py --validate` completed successfully after the packaged sibling `config/` fallback landed in `platform/repo.py`, `platform/ledger/_common.py`, and `scripts/workflow_catalog.py`.

`make converge-browser-runner env=production` completed successfully from the exact-main replay baseline and republished the private browser-runner runtime plus the governed `/v1/browser-runner/*` route.

verification.check: API gateway replay with Dify browser-runner fix
verification.observed: After the packaged config lookup fix and automatic JSON `Content-Type` header fix in `scripts/browser_runner_client.py`, `make converge-api-gateway env=production` completed successfully with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=278 changed=116 failed=0 skipped=38`.

verification.check: Private, operator, and Dify browser-runner proofs
verification.observed: The private browser-runner `/healthz` and smoke flow succeeded through a local tunnel, the operator route at `https://api.lv3.org/v1/browser-runner` returned `{"status":"ok","artifact_root":"/data/artifacts"}` and a successful smoke session for the platform-context bearer token, and the governed Dify route `https://api.lv3.org/v1/dify-tools/browser-run-session` returned HTTP 200 with heading `LV3 Browser Runner Smoke`, result `BROWSER RUNNER`, plus screenshot and PDF artifacts.

verification.check: Synchronized main-promotion verification and gate replay
verification.observed: `curl -fsS https://api.lv3.org/healthz` returned `{"status":"ok"}`; `https://api.lv3.org/v1/platform/services` listed `browser_runner` with `gateway_prefix: /v1/browser-runner`, internal URL `http://10.10.10.20:8096`, and ADR `0261`; guest-local `curl http://127.0.0.1:8096/healthz` plus a smoke `POST /sessions` succeeded through the Proxmox jump path; `uv run --with-requirements requirements/browser-runner.txt python scripts/browser_runner_smoke.py --base-url https://api.lv3.org/v1/browser-runner --bearer-token-file /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/platform-context/api-token.txt` returned the expected heading, uppercase result, and two artifacts; the governed Dify `browser-run-session` POST returned HTTP 200 with screenshot and PDF artifacts via `X-LV3-Dify-Api-Key`; and `make pre-push-gate` passed on the synchronized promotion tree.

notes: The first browser-runner live apply became true at platform version `0.130.61`, which remains the first platform version where ADR 0261 is implemented.

The synchronized promotion verification ran against `origin/main` commit `8cd0623c2ee5717c1dd2ae1eedc6e693fb24e61e`, which already carried integrated repo version `0.177.95` and observed platform version `0.130.63`.

The operator gateway proof continues to use the controller-local platform-context bearer token because `lv3-agent-hub` remains `platform-read` only, while the governed Dify proof uses `.local/dify/tools-api-key.txt` via `X-LV3-Dify-Api-Key`.
